text: Woke up with a messy hair
Still so sleepy….
Let’s work hard to make it an enjoyable day
Annoying weather for me who goes to school by bicycle
Hope it doesn’t rain
After washing my face and brushing teeth, quickly preparing lunch
Last night’s Yangnyeom chicken
I didn’t have any thigh meat, so made it with tenderloin chicken instead
I’ll really be late for school without any pre-prepared food
Only need to fry eggs
My family always makes sweet fried eggs
Preparing lunch box which heating up the frypan
Heated up rice in the microwave
I always attempt with bare hands….
Should learn my lesson by now
Friend very nicely
Wonder if the Yangnyeom chicken tastes good..
Finished packing!
Put the lid on after cooling to prevent any rotting
Breakfast was yogurt and leftovers from lunchbox
Specially bought strawberries because they were only 200 yen
Glass that my parents gave to me as a present
Makes me want to see my parents and cats again
I’ll wash the dishes once I come home
Bought a cosmetics case at the $1 shop
I love it because it’s so easy to use
Need to hurry because I ate too slowly
Even when I carefully set my hair
it’s gone by the time I get to school
I use a backpack by DAYLIFE
Bought it with 6000 yen
The SHIEN card case is too cute
I’ll clean my room once I come home
Not the time to be filming
I’ll get going!
Back home!
Hope everyone going to school and work is well
Today’s sunset
This morning’s weather seems like a dream
My phone fell from my pocket on the way to school
The cracks bothered me even during school
Time to clean the room
Exams are coming up…
So much to memorize
Annoyed at myself for not being able to memorize it
Where is my concentration switch
Let’s go through it one by one without stressing
And without noticing, I’ll be fully concentrated by then
Dinner is sprouts and beans wrapped in pork
Made it with a recommended recipe
Made 3 and saved one for tomorrow’s lunch
Lately, I’ve been enjoying cooking
Even though I hate the washing
My table cloth has so many wrinkles after putting it in the dryer
I love doing this because it fills my room with a good smell
Recommended drama from my friend
My friend who never cries, said she cried after watching this
So I wonder what will happen to me if I cry so easily
Starting watching while drying my hair
But I’ve stopped doing anything now
